prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（原理科）最低位次约3574→3573→4336→4834→4901名，2021–2022年基本稳定在3570名附近，2023年起持续后移，2023年4336名、2024年4834 名、2025年4901名，近3年累计后移约1328名，呈逐年后移趋势，2025年基准约4901名；该校在云南省物理类招生计划2021年44人、2022年46人、2023年46人、2 024年42人、2025年49人；2026年计划50人，较2025年增加1人（扩招约2%），招生名额小幅增加，对竞争有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央财经大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第42名（2025年第45名、2024年第44名），排名稳中有升，在京财经类院校中位居前列，办学层次对考生有持续吸引力；2023年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业位次下滑），但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第97位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升 温信号；历史投档异常记录中2023年有低关注度信号，影响有限；应用经济学获评A、理论经济学获评A-，均为财经类核心学科，与该校金融学类、财政学类、 统计学类等招生专业高度对应，学科实力对相关专业报考有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类专业热度从2021年推荐（72.42）降至2022–2025年分化观望（ 60–65区间），整体呈降温分化态势，财经类报考热度趋于理性；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业热度持续走高，可能分流部分物理类高分考生；云南省2026年高考总报名约 37.79万人，按近年科类比例估算物理类约22.92万人，较2025年物理类17.33万人增加约32%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，属跨省招生；该校在云南省物理类招生计划约42–50人，属典型的外省优质生源竞争格局，未出现显著的地域偏好变化信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4901名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招2%、云南省物理类考生规模大幅增长约32%、财经类专业热度分化观望以及工科热门专业分流等因素，考生规模大增是主要 矛盾，扩招幅度不足以抵消竞争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续小幅后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约4931名，区间4431–5431名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）
- 金融学（含北外英语联培）
- 经济学类（澄明书院）（数理经济与数理金融、国际金融与公司理财）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 统计学类（统计学、应用统计学、经济统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学、资产评估）
- 精算学
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学、财务管理、审计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、人工智能）
- 经济与贸易类（国际经济与贸易、国际商务、贸易经济）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）
- 保险学（含北理工智能保险联培）
- 劳动与社会保障（精算学、社保双学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4431–5431名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业为冲刺、三档专业为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如4400名以内）可重点冲击金融学类、经济学类（澄明书 院）等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（5400名左右）建议以二档财政学类、工商管理类（会计学院）为主，三档经济与贸易类、商学院专业保底；计算机类虽为三档但社会热 度极高，实际竞争可能更激烈，建议位次较优时考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (formerly Science) minimum rankings approximately 3574→3573→4336→4834→4901, basically stable around 3570 in 2021–2022, continuously declining since 2023, 4336 in 2023, 4834 in 2024, 4901 in 2025, cumulative decline of about 1328 over the past 3 years, showing a year-by-year decline trend, 2025 baseline approximately 4901; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Physics Category was 44 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 49 in 2025; 2026 plan 50, an increase of 1 compared to 2025 (expansion of about 2%), a slight increase in enrollment slots, providing minor relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Main Ranking 2026 42nd (2025 45th, 2024 44th), ranking steadily rising, among the top in Beijing finance and economics institutions, the university level has sustained appeal to candidates; 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (Journalism and Communication major rankings declined), but no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 97th, evaluation average, short video exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious signal of increased application attention; historical admission anomaly records show a low attention signal in 2023, limited impact; Applied Economics rated A, Theoretical Economics rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, Statistics, providing positive support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics major popularity dropped from recommended (72.42) in 2021 to differentiated wait-and-see (60–65 range) in 2022–2025, overall cooling and differentiation trend, finance and economics application popularity becoming more rational; Computer, Electronic Information/Communication and other engineering majors' popularity continues to rise, potentially diverting some high-scoring Physics Category candidates; Yunnan 2026 total college entrance exam registrations approximately 377,900, estimated Physics Category about 229,200 based on recent subject ratio, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 Physics Category 173,300, significant growth in candidate numbers, competition notably intensifying; Central University of Finance and Economics located in Beijing, cross-province enrollment; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Physics Category about 42–50, typical competition pattern for high-quality students from other provinces, no significant signal of regional preference change.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4901, 2026 enrollment plan slight expansion of 2%, Yunnan Physics Category candidate numbers significant growth of about 32%, finance and economics major popularity differentiated wait-and-see, and diversion by popular engineering majors, the major contradiction is the large increase in candidate numbers, the expansion is insufficient to offset intensified competition, expected 2026 minimum admission ranking to continue slight decline (ranking number increases) from 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 4931, range 4431–5431.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Finance (including Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training)
- Economics (Chengming College) (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance, International Finance and Corporate Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Statistics (Statistics, Applied Statistics, Economic Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Actuarial Science
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Talent Class)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics)
- Business Administration (Business School) (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Insurance (including Beijing Institute of Technology Intelligent Insurance Joint Training)
- Labor and Social Security (Actuarial Science, Social Security Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range 4431–5431, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 4400), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Finance, Economics (Chengming College); if ranking is close to the upper bound (around 5400), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 Public Finance, Business Administration (Accounting School), with Tier 3 Economics and Trade, Business School majors as safety; although Computer Science is Tier 3, its social popularity is extremely high, actual competition may be fiercer, consider when ranking is relatively good.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) was approximately 518 → 573 → 988 → 616 → 462. It remained stable in the 500–600 range in 2021–2022, dropped significantly to 988 in 2023, rebounded to 616 in 2024, and further advanced to 462 in 2025, a new high in recent years. The trend shows a clear forward movement in the last two years, with a baseline of about 462 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan's History Category was 19 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 19, a decrease of 1 (5% reduction) from 2025, slightly tightening admissions and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 42nd (45th in 2025, 44th in 2024), showing a stable upward trend. It is among the top finance and economics universities in Beijing, with a level that continues to attract candidates. In 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (declining rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but there have been no major negative incidents in recent years. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 97th, rated as average, with mid-to-low short video exposure, showing no clear signal of increased application interest. Historical admission anomalies include a low-attention signal in 2023, with limited impact. Applied Economics is rated A, and Theoretical Economics is rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, closely matching the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics, providing positive support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Finance/Finance/Economics majors dropped from a recommendation level of 72.42 in 2021 to a differentiated wait-and-see level of 60–65 in 2022–2025, showing an overall cooling and differentiation trend, with a more rational application enthusiasm for finance and economics. In 2026, the total number of Yunnan Gaokao registrants is about 377,900. Based on recent subject ratio estimates, History Category candidates are about 148,700, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment plan in Yunnan's History Category is relatively small (about 19–21 people), representing a typical competition pattern for high-quality students from other provinces, with no significant signal of regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 462, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 5%, the significant increase of about 32% in Yunnan's History Category candidate pool, and the differentiated wait-and-see trend in finance and economics major popularity, intensified competition is the main contradiction. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further advance (smaller ranking number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 428, with a range of 363–493.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Finance
- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Law (including dual-degree programs)
- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business School) (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Public Administration (Administrative Management, Public Affairs Management, Urban Management, International Politics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 363–493, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 360), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Finance and Public Finance. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 490), focus on Tier 2 Business Administration (Accounting School) and Economics and Trade, with Tier 3 Business School majors as safety.
